applied.action: Added new 'テスト隔離（test isolation）要件' section. Mandated unique worktreeId per spec (e2e-split-a / e2e-split-b instead of generic test-worktree), beforeEach/afterEach clearing of commandmate:terminalSplits:* and split-width keys, starting from known initial state (split=1). Added isolation acceptance criterion and a 'test infra / 隔離への波及' subsection in 想定影響範囲. Updated Scenario 1/2 pseudocode comments to reference unique IDs and localStorage cleanup.

Rewrote 'テストフィクスチャ戦略' to make API-route mocking via page.route the PREFERRED strategy (decouples from shared db.sqlite / real git scan / session APIs for CI reproducibility). Documented webServer=npm run dev shared-DB + fullyParallel worker race background. For seed-DB fallback, mandated globalSetup pre-seed OR dedicated DB path OR workers:1. Added package.json/globalSetup possibility to 想定影響範囲. Updated fixture acceptance criterion to prefer page.route.

Expanded CI 統合方針 A with mandatory cost-control: non-blocking initial introduction (continue-on-error / independent job), actions/cache for Playwright browsers, chromium-only install (--with-deps chromium), and optional build+start instead of dev. Marked the e2e job as net-new (no existing Playwright step) in 想定影響範囲 with impact evaluation column.

Confirmed chromium scoping via in-spec self-skip (test.skip(testInfo.project.name !== 'chromium')) and explicitly forbade changing playwright.config.ts projects/global (timeout/workers/use). Added that viewport 1920x1080 must use spec-level test.use, not global. Added a 'スコープ外' bullet for config project/global changes. Inserted self-skip lines into both scenario pseudocodes. Updated playwright.config.ts row in 想定影響範囲 to '原則無変更'.

Specified data-testid must go on the inner <button> at TerminalContainer.tsx:56 (aria-label='Expand history panel'), NOT the wrapper div (terminal-container-expand-bar, L52). Documented the Scenario 1 flaw: HistoryExpandBar only renders when History is COLLAPSED, but useHistoryPaneState defaults visible=true, so history-pane-expand click would find no button. Added a prominent callout box + two corrected sequences (history is initially visible so expand step is unnecessary / resizer already present; OR collapse-then-expand if the button must be exercised). Added matching acceptance criteria.

Noted in the test isolation section that dragTo also persists split widths to localStorage (useTerminalSplits.ts:85-109), compounding S3-001 cleanup need; folded split-width key cleanup into the isolation requirement and acceptance criterion.
Added docs/module-reference.md and docs/implementation-history.md to the 想定影響範囲 既存変更 table (marked optional, since the testid is test-only). Clarified CHANGELOG [Unreleased] entry wording.

summary: All Stage 3 impact-scope findings (2 Must Fix, 3 Should Fix, 2 Nice to Have) applied to GitHub Issue #735. Key changes: new 'テスト隔離要件' section (unique worktreeId + localStorage cleanup of commandmate:terminalSplits:*/split-width keys; S3-001/S3-006); fixture strategy rewritten to prefer page.route API mocking decoupling from shared db.sqlite/git/session (S3-002); CI 統合方針 A hardened with non-blocking + actions/cache + chromium-only install for the net-new e2e job (S3-003); chromium scoping fixed to in-spec self-skip leaving playwright.config.ts untouched (S3-004); history-pane-expand testid pinned to inner <button> at TerminalContainer.tsx:56 with Scenario 1 sequence corrected for the default visible=true expand-bar-not-rendered flaw (S3-005); docs-impact list extended with module-reference/implementation-history (S3-007). 想定影響範囲 now reflects additive production touch (TerminalContainer testid), net-new CI job, and test isolation requirements. Stage 3 reflection history table appended. Japanese preserved, original structure maintained, edit/append only.
